title: Sous-Vide Fermented Crumbly Bramble Crunch
description: A diabetic-friendly Algerian dish featuring fermented bramley apples cooked sous-vide and served as a post-workout snack with a crunchy texture.
instructions: Place the Bramley Apples in a pot with the adjusted sugar, apple cider vinegar, and filtered water.
Bring to a boil then reduce heat and let simmer for about 20 minutes or until the apples have broken down slightly.
Using an immersion blender or carefully transferring to a blender, puree the mixture until smooth. Strain through cheesecloth to remove any seeds or pulp.
